01 = If someone else sets up equipment, caregiver is able to manage all other aspects.
02 = Caregiver requires considerable assistance from another person to manage equipment, but independently completes significant portions of task.
03 = Caregiver is only able to complete small portions of task (i.e., administer nebulizer treatment, clean/store/dispose of equipment or supplies).
